name: slack
description: Work with Slack using the configured Slack integration.

bot_token.title: Slack bot token
bot_token.description: Create a Slack app at https://api.slack.com/apps with bot scopes (channels:read, chat:write, etc.) and paste its xoxb- token.

team_id.title: Slack workspace (team) ID
team_id.description: Your Slack workspace ID, e.g. T01ABCDEF. Find it via your workspace URL or the Slack app's Basic Information page.

interface.longDescription: Use Slack to summarize channels, draft messages, and organize team conversations through the connected Slack integration.
defaultPrompt: Summarize unread activity, draft replies, or prepare updates
